narrative: SNB sight deposit rates and 10-year yields hold steady at 0.00% and 0.481% — USD/CHF at 0.7961 as the 375bp Fed-SNB carry advantage anchors the pair; gold lower -0.82%; equities -2.64%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 19.5.
